intentSynonyms: create a database item in notion
add a database item in notion
make a new database item in notion
open a new database item in notion
add a row to a database in notion
description: Add a new row/item to a Notion database. Use get_database first to understand the property schema.

database_id.description: Database (collection) ID to add a row to

properties.description: Property values as key-value pairs. Keys are property names (from get_database). Values are strings.
